name: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque
description: One of the world's largest mosques — 82 domes, 1000+ columns, and the world's largest hand-knotted carpet

name: Louvre Abu Dhabi
description: World-class art and civilization museum under a stunning geometric dome designed by Jean Nouvel

name: Ferrari World Abu Dhabi
description: World's first Ferrari-branded theme park featuring Formula Rossa — the world's fastest roller coaster

name: Warner Bros. World Abu Dhabi
description: Immersive indoor theme park featuring DC Comics and Looney Tunes characters across 6 themed lands

name: Yas Waterworld
description: Arabia's largest water park with 43 rides, slides, and attractions including the Slalom Racer

name: SeaWorld Abu Dhabi
description: World's first SeaWorld without theatrical orca shows — focus on marine conservation and education

name: Qasr Al Watan
description: Majestic Presidential Palace open to public — showcasing UAE governance heritage and architecture

name: Emirates Palace
description: Iconic ultra-luxury hotel — symbol of Abu Dhabi opulence with gold-leaf architecture and private beach

name: Corniche Beach
description: 8km pristine waterfront beach stretching along Abu Dhabi's stunning bay — free public access

name: Mangrove National Park
description: Protected mangrove ecosystem — kayak tours available, rare bird species, unique urban nature reserve

name: Observation Deck at 300
description: Breathtaking 360-degree panoramic views of Abu Dhabi from the 74th floor of Etihad Towers

name: Heritage Village
description: Open-air museum showcasing traditional Emirati way of life — falconry, pottery, and pearl diving displays

name: Saadiyat Cultural District
description: Emerging world-class cultural hub — home to Louvre AD, future Guggenheim, and Zayed National Museum

name: Jubail Mangrove Park
description: Peaceful 2.5km boardwalk through pristine mangrove forest — flamingos and herons regularly spotted

name: Yas Marina Circuit
description: Home of the Abu Dhabi Formula 1 Grand Prix — track drives, karting, and pit lane tours available

name: The Galleria Al Maryah Island
description: Abu Dhabi's premier luxury shopping destination with 400+ stores, fine dining, and waterfront promenade

name: Yas Mall
description: Abu Dhabi's largest mall — 400+ stores, entertainment attractions, and food court with sea views

name: Abu Dhabi Desert Safari
description: Classic Arabian desert experience — dune bashing, camel riding, henna, and traditional BBQ dinner

name: Yas Beach
description: Pristine private beach club with white sand, water sports, beach loungers, and beachside dining

name: Abu Dhabi Golf Club
description: Championship golf course hosting annual HSBC Abu Dhabi Golf Championship — stunning coastal views
